raw.description: Guide users through adding a new connector action to a Copilot Studio agent. Connector actions require UI-based connection setup, so this skill walks users through the Copilot Studio portal steps, then delegates to edit-action for YAML modifications.

standard.name: add-action
standard.description: Guide users through adding a new connector action to a Copilot Studio agent. Connector actions require UI-based connection setup, so this skill walks users through the Copilot Studio portal steps, then delegates to edit-action for YAML modifications.

raw.description: Generate and insert an Adaptive Card into a Copilot Studio topic using AdaptiveCardPrompt. Use when the user asks to add an adaptive card, rich card, form card, info card, confirmation card, or interactive card to a topic.

standard.name: add-adaptive-card
standard.description: Generate and insert an Adaptive Card into a Copilot Studio topic using AdaptiveCardPrompt. Use when the user asks to add an adaptive card, rich card, form card, info card, confirmation card, or interactive card to a topic.

raw.description: Add generative answer nodes (SearchAndSummarizeContent or AnswerQuestionWithAI) to a Copilot Studio topic. Use this instead of /add-node when the user asks to add grounded answers, knowledge search, generative answers, or AI-powered responses — these nodes require specific patterns (ConditionGroup follow-up, knowledge source references, autoSend, responseCaptureType) that /add-node does not cover.

standard.name: add-generative-answers
standard.description: Add generative answer nodes (SearchAndSummarizeContent or AnswerQuestionWithAI) to a Copilot Studio topic. Use this instead of /add-node when the user asks to add grounded answers, knowledge search, generative answers, or AI-powered responses — these nodes require specific patterns (ConditionGroup follow-up, knowledge source references, autoSend, responseCaptureType) that /add-node does not cover.

raw.description: Add a global variable to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user needs a variable that persists across topics in the same conversation and can optionally be visible to the AI orchestrator.

standard.name: add-global-variable
standard.description: Add a global variable to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user needs a variable that persists across topics in the same conversation and can optionally be visible to the AI orchestrator.

raw.description: Add a knowledge source (public website or SharePoint) to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user asks to add a knowledge source, documentation URL, website, or SharePoint site for the agent to search.

standard.name: add-knowledge
standard.description: Add a knowledge source (public website or SharePoint) to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user asks to add a knowledge source, documentation URL, website, or SharePoint site for the agent to search.

raw.description: Add or modify a node in an existing Copilot Studio topic. Use when the user asks to add a question, message, condition, variable, or other node to a topic. Do NOT use this for generative answers or knowledge search — use /add-generative-answers instead.

standard.name: add-node
standard.description: Add or modify a node in an existing Copilot Studio topic. Use when the user asks to add a question, message, condition, variable, or other node to a topic. Do NOT use this for generative answers or knowledge search — use /add-generative-answers instead.

raw.description: Add child agents, connected agents, or other multi-agent patterns to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user asks to create a sub-agent, child agent, connected agent, or call another agent.

standard.name: add-other-agents
standard.description: Add child agents, connected agents, or other multi-agent patterns to a Copilot Studio agent. Use when the user asks to create a sub-agent, child agent, connected agent, or call another agent.

raw.description: Send a message to a Copilot Studio agent via DirectLine v3. Use for agents with no auth or manual auth. Requires a token endpoint URL or DirectLine secret.

standard.name: chat-directline
standard.description: Send a message to a Copilot Studio agent via DirectLine v3. Use for agents with no auth or manual auth. Requires a token endpoint URL or DirectLine secret.

raw.description: Send a message to a Copilot Studio agent via the Copilot Studio Client SDK (M365). Use for agents with integrated auth (Entra ID SSO). Requires an App Registration Client ID.

standard.name: chat-sdk
standard.description: Send a message to a Copilot Studio agent via the Copilot Studio Client SDK (M365). Use for agents with integrated auth (Entra ID SSO). Requires an App Registration Client ID.

raw.description: DEPRECATED: Use /copilot-studio:detect-mode then /copilot-studio:chat-directline or /copilot-studio:chat-sdk instead.

standard.name: chat-with-agent
standard.description: DEPRECATED: Use /copilot-studio:detect-mode then /copilot-studio:chat-directline or /copilot-studio:chat-sdk instead.

raw.description: Clone a Copilot Studio agent from the cloud. Guides through environment selection, agent selection, and downloads agent YAML files.

standard.name: clone-agent
standard.description: Clone a Copilot Studio agent from the cloud. Guides through environment selection, agent selection, and downloads agent YAML files.

raw.description: Create plugin development eval scenarios (JSON files with natural prompts and deterministic checks for testing plugin skills). NOT for Copilot Studio in-product evaluation — use /copilot-studio:create-eval-set for that.

standard.name: create-eval
standard.description: Create plugin development eval scenarios (JSON files with natural prompts and deterministic checks for testing plugin skills). NOT for Copilot Studio in-product evaluation — use /copilot-studio:create-eval-set for that.

raw.description: Detect a Copilot Studio agent's authentication mode (DirectLine vs M365) by querying Dataverse. Returns the mode and connection details needed to chat.

standard.name: detect-mode
standard.description: Detect a Copilot Studio agent's authentication mode (DirectLine vs M365) by querying Dataverse. Returns the mode and connection details needed to chat.

raw.description: DEPRECATED: Use /copilot-studio:chat-with-agent instead — it auto-detects DirectLine vs M365 mode. This skill is kept for backwards compatibility only.
raw.allowed-tools: Bash(node *directline-chat.bundle.js *), Bash(node *manage-agent.bundle.js detect-mode *), Read, Glob, Grep

standard.name: directline-chat
standard.description: DEPRECATED: Use /copilot-studio:chat-with-agent instead — it auto-detects DirectLine vs M365 mode. This skill is kept for backwards compatibility only.

raw.description: Edit an existing action (TaskDialog) in a Copilot Studio agent. Supports connector actions and MCP server actions. Modify inputs, outputs, descriptions, connection mode, and other properties.
raw.argument-hint: <what to change, e.g. "add description to SharePoint inputs">

standard.name: edit-action
standard.description: Edit an existing action (TaskDialog) in a Copilot Studio agent. Supports connector actions and MCP server actions. Modify inputs, outputs, descriptions, connection mode, and other properties.

raw.description: Edit Copilot Studio agent settings, instructions, or configuration. Use when the user asks to change agent instructions, display name, conversation starters, AI settings, or generative actions toggle.

standard.name: edit-agent
standard.description: Edit Copilot Studio agent settings, instructions, or configuration. Use when the user asks to change agent instructions, display name, conversation starters, AI settings, or generative actions toggle.

raw.description: Modify topic triggers — trigger phrases and model description. Use when the user asks to add, remove, or change trigger phrases, or edit a topic's model description.

standard.name: edit-triggers
standard.description: Modify topic triggers — trigger phrases and model description. Use when the user asks to add, remove, or change trigger phrases, or edit a topic's model description.

raw.name: int-patterns
raw.description: Pattern library for Copilot Studio agent design. Contains proven and recommended implementation patterns with YAML examples. Used by the Advisor agent to suggest patterns and by the Author agent to reference YAML structure during implementation. USE FOR: design guidance, pattern suggestions, review against best practices, troubleshooting known pitfalls, YAML reference during implementation. DO NOT USE FOR: general YAML schema reference (use int-reference), topic creation mechanics (use new-topic).

standard.name: int-patterns
standard.description: Pattern library for Copilot Studio agent design. Contains proven and recommended implementation patterns with YAML examples. Used by the Advisor agent to suggest patterns and by the Author agent to reference YAML structure during implementation. USE FOR: design guidance, pattern suggestions, review against best practices, troubleshooting known pitfalls, YAML reference during implementation. DO NOT USE FOR: general YAML schema reference (use int-reference), topic creation mechanics (use new-topic).

raw.name: int-reference
raw.description: Reference tables for Copilot Studio YAML authoring: triggers, actions, variables, entities, Power Fx functions, templates. Preloaded by author and advisor agents.

standard.name: int-reference
standard.description: Reference tables for Copilot Studio YAML authoring: triggers, actions, variables, entities, Power Fx functions, templates. Preloaded by author and advisor agents.

raw.description: List all available kind discriminator values from the Copilot Studio YAML schema. Use when the user asks what kinds/types are available.

standard.name: list-kinds
standard.description: List all available kind discriminator values from the Copilot Studio YAML schema. Use when the user asks what kinds/types are available.

raw.description: List all topics in the Copilot Studio agent with their trigger types, phrases, and action counts. Use when the user wants to see what topics exist.

standard.name: list-topics
standard.description: List all topics in the Copilot Studio agent with their trigger types, phrases, and action counts. Use when the user wants to see what topics exist.

raw.description: Look up Copilot Studio YAML schema definitions. Use when the user asks about schema structure, element properties, or how to use a specific YAML kind.

standard.name: lookup-schema
standard.description: Look up Copilot Studio YAML schema definitions. Use when the user asks about schema structure, element properties, or how to use a specific YAML kind.

raw.description: Push/pull Copilot Studio agent content via the VS Code extension's LanguageServerHost LSP binary. Handles authentication (interactive browser login for push/pull, device code flow for chat token), sync push, sync pull, clone, and diff operations.

standard.description: Push/pull Copilot Studio agent content via the VS Code extension's LanguageServerHost LSP binary. Handles authentication (interactive browser login for push/pull, device code flow for chat token), sync push, sync pull, clone, and diff operations.

standard.name: new-topic
standard.description: Create a new Copilot Studio topic YAML file. Use when the user asks to create a new topic, conversation flow, or dialog for their agent.

Bash(node *run-tests.js *), Bash(npm install *), Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Edit

raw.description: Validate Copilot Studio agent YAML files using the LSP binary's full diagnostics (YAML structure, Power Fx, schema, cross-file references). Use when the user asks to check, validate, or verify YAML files.
